name: mandato-digital
description: MVP interno do Mandato Digital para onboarding, geracao e revisao de conteudo politico.

scripts.test:sentinel: vitest run src/lib/sentinel-theme-relevance.test.ts src/lib/sentinel-integration.test.ts src/lib/sentinel-theme-scenarios.test.ts src/lib/sentinel-pipeline.test.ts src/lib/sentinel-editorial.test.ts src/lib/sentinel-suggestions.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:sentinel: E2E_DISABLE_AUTH=true SENTINEL_RSS_FIXTURES=true SENTINEL_V2_PIPELINES=false NEXT_PUBLIC_PRODUCT_NAV_V2=true NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY= NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN= NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID= NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID= NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET= NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID= npm run build && E2E_DISABLE_AUTH=true SENTINEL_RSS_FIXTURES=true SENTINEL_V2_PIPELINES=false NEXT_PUBLIC_PRODUCT_NAV_V2=true NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY= NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN= NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID= NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID= PW_USE_START=1 PW_DEV_PORT=3012 PW_FORCE_FRESH_SERVER=1 playwright test tests/e2e/sentinel-radar.spec.ts
scripts.test:e2e:argil: npm run build && PW_FORCE_FRESH_SERVER=1 PW_DEV_PORT=3010 PW_USE_START=1 playwright test tests/e2e/argil-video-flow.spec.ts
